prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild, Renji Dawnblade in a crimson cloak and leather armor approaches the wooden counter, laying out a large, weathered quest map. Mika Oakspire, an androgynous trader in a neat vest and guild sash, watches. Renji gestures to the map corners, asking for assistance. Cinematic lighting, anime aesthetic, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; Mika Oakspire smiles and places a heavy iron paperweight and a glowing mana crystal on the map corners to secure it. Mika then points to a specific location on the map, and Renji Dawnblade leans in, nodding in agreement. Consistent camera angle, no text, no watermark.
